title: Software Engineer
description: Full-stack or backend software engineer building web applications and APIs

title: Data Scientist
description: Machine learning and data analysis professional building predictive models

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Infrastructure, CI/CD pipeline, and cloud deployment automation specialist

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build user interfaces and web experiences using modern JavaScript frameworks

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Design and build iOS or Android mobile applications for consumers or enterprise

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines, warehouses, and ETL systems at scale

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Deploy and productionize machine learning models into real-world systems

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protect systems and networks from threats through monitoring and incident response

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, or GCP for enterprise clients

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Design intuitive user experiences through research, wireframing, and prototyping

title: QA / Test Engineer
description: Ensure software quality through automated and manual testing strategies

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to surface insights and support decision-making with dashboards and reports

title: AI Application Developer
description: Build AI-powered products and integrations using LLM APIs and modern frameworks
